case_title: RUFUS L COLE VS. REGUS MANAGEMENT,LLC(DELAWARE (US))

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TODD BARTHELL, COMMUNITY MANAGER TEAM LEAD. FILED BY DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT,LLC(DELAWARE (US))

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-23-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RUFUS L COLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TODD BARTHELL (COMMUNITY MANAGER TEAM LEAD). PARTIES WILL EXPLORE SETTLEMENT WHEREBY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $4,122.96 AND BOTH PARTIES WILL MUTUALLY RELEASE ALL CLAIM RELATED TO THIS CASE. PROGRESS REPORT SET FOR MAY-23, 2023 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT 506. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY ANY PARTY, THEN CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ("DWP"). IF THERE IS AN APPEARANCE, HEARING WILL BE CONDUCTED FOR JUDGEMENT DECISION. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY COLE, RUFUS L REGUS MANAGEMENT,LLC(DELAWARE (US))
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COLE, RUFUS L AS TO DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT,LLC(DELAWARE (US)) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-10-2023 SC-100 MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED;INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
